title: Let's Not Get Angry
overview: One-time gangster Antoine is enjoying retirement on the coast, now managing a boating club. He receives a visit from a former accomplice who asks for a loan. The money will be repaid by a crook who is now in hiding; Antoine intends to recover his money.

trailers.title: Ne nous fâchons pas - Ils m'ont traité de brute - morceau choisi
